text:
is a Cadet Corps cadet.

Appearance

Sasha has brown hair kept in a ponytail and a side-fringe parted to the right. She has swirly almond-colored eyes and wears the typical cadet uniform.

Personality

Sasha is a gluttonous person - she is almost never without a piece of food in her hands. As well, she seems to possess an innocent, simple-minded side to her that people are able to manipulate to their advantage.
